Combat sport events in 2023
ONE Friday Fights 9: Eersel vs. Sinsamut 2
PromotionONE Championship
DateMarch 17, 2023 (2023-03-17)
VenueLumpinee Boxing Stadium
CityBangkok, Thailand
Event chronology
ONE Friday Fights 8: Petsukumvit vs. Petchmuangsri ONE Friday Fights 9: Eersel vs. Sinsamut 2 ONE Friday Fights 10: Yodkrisada vs. Thepthaksin

ONE Friday Fights 9: Eersel vs. Sinsamut 2 (also known as ONE Lumpinee 9) was a combat sports event produced by ONE Championship that took place on March 17, 2023, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand.[1][2]

Background

[edit]

A ONE Lightweight Muay Thai World Championship rematch between current champion Regian Eersel (also current ONE Lightweight Kickboxing Champion) and former title challenger Sinsamut Klinmee headlined the event.[1] The pair previously fought at ONE on Prime Video 3 in October 2022, which Eersel won by split decision.[3]

Results

[edit]
Main card (YouTube / Watch ONE)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight Muay Thai Regian Eersel (c) def. Sinsamut Klinmee KO (punch to the body) 4 1:17 [a]
Bantamweight Muay Thai Muangthai P.K.Saenchai def. Kulabdam Sor.Jor.Piek-U-Thai KO (elbow) 3 1:37
Strawweight Muay Thai Sam-A Gaiyanghadao def. Ryan Sheehan KO (punch) 2 2:52
Catchweight (121 lbs) Muay Thai PhetjeeJa Lukjaoporongtom def. Fani Peloumpi TKO (punch to the body) 2 1:38
Flyweight Muay Thai Sulaiman Looksuan def. Chaongoh Jitmuangnon KO (punch) 2 1:30
Preliminary card (FanDuel TV)
Catchweight (140 lbs) Muay Thai Saeksan Or. Kwanmuang def. Silviu Vitez Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight (140 lbs) Muay Thai Yodlekpet Or. Atchariya def. Saman Ashouri KO (punch) 2 0:27
Flyweight Muay Thai Tagir Khalilov def. Black Panther KO (punch to the body) 1 2:04
Flyweight Tatsumitsu Wada def. Ernesto Montilla Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 1:52
Catchweight (159 lbs) Yoon Chang Min def. Kirill Gorobets Decision (split) 3 5:00
Flyweight Muay Thai Nakrob Fairtex def. Chen Jiayi TKO (knees) 2 2:45
  1. ^ For the ONE Lightweight Muay Thai World Championship.

[4]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters were awarded bonuses.[5][6]

  • Performance of the Night ($50,000): Regian Eersel
  • Performance of the Night ($10,000): Muangthai P.K.Saenchai, Sam-A Gaiyanghadao, Sulaiman Looksuan, Saeksan Or. Kwanmuang, Silviu Vitez, Yodlekpet Or. Pitisak and Tagir Khalilov

  6. ^ Tom Taylor (2023-03-08). "ONE Championship Friday Fights 9: Sam-A Gaiyanghadao posts bonus-winning KO in comeback bout". South China Morning Post. Retrieved 2023-03-08.
